posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran’s Fars News says negotiations between the US and Iran are "ongoing" and no final decision has been reached.

Iran’s Fars News also says Iran will not accept an agreement that ignores Lebanon and if a deal is reached, it would follow a 4-stage process.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
